title: Why Inference is hard..
summary: Caleb Writes Code examines the complexities of LLM inference, covering model loading strategies and quantization methods including mmap, GGUF, AWQ, and EXL2. The video also reviews inference engines like llama.cpp, vLLM, SGLang, and TensorRT-LLM, discussing pre-fill, decoding, concurrency, and scheduling challenges.
